hypothesis: Re-register the leakage-safe Phase4D model as the immutable Phase5 baseline.
change_reason: Establish a versioned comparison point before introducing a deep ensemble.

hypothesis: Five independently initialized patient-level MIL models improve accuracy and epistemic error detection.
change_reason: Phase4D produced two high-confidence errors and MC Dropout epistemic error-detection AUC of 0.167.

hypothesis: Fold-local self-supervised spectral pretraining improves representations and corrects systematic high-confidence errors.
change_reason: P5-01 improved OOF accuracy and calibration but retained the same two legacy-holdout errors.

hypothesis: A first-derivative view adds peak-shape information and improves patient classification over intensity-only P5-01.
change_reason: P5-02 reconstruction SSL degraded discrimination; P5-03 targets Raman peak morphology directly without pretraining.

hypothesis: Fixed equal-weight fusion of complementary intensity and derivative ensembles reaches 95 percent OOF accuracy.
change_reason: P5-01 and P5-03 each achieved 38/41 but made disjoint OOF errors.

hypothesis: OOF Integrated Gradients and representation-aware OOD scores can provide faithful Raman explanations and safer review prompts without changing P5-04 predictions.
change_reason: P5-04 reached 39/41 internally but retained two consensus errors in the historical holdout.
